title: Check And Record VISU_IO_DIAG Banner Messages
summary: Use the VISU_IO_DIAG informational banner on the Operator Station HMI to review alarms or informational messages and record the messages shown. The source describes this screen as read-only and intended for troubleshooting.
when_to_use: Use when troubleshooting from the Operator Station HMI and you need to review the alarms or informational messages currently displayed in the VISU_IO_DIAG banner.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to perform corrective action, because the source only documents message display and navigation.
Do not infer message meaning beyond what is explicitly displayed.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the VISU_IO_DIAG screen, review the informational banner, navigate through available messages using the banner arrows, and record the displayed messages.

safety_notes: The VISU_IO_DIAG screen is read-only and can be used for troubleshooting.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Operator Station HMI

access_required: Access to the Operator Station HMI
system_preconditions: VISU_IO_DIAG screen is available on the Operator Station HMI
external_references: Figure 4-27, Operator Station IO Diagnostics Screen

visual_references.description: Operator Station IO Diagnostics Screen showing the read-only VISU_IO_DIAG screen and its informational banner.
Operator Station display controls showing how to access HMI screens, including VISU_IO_DIAG.

steps.title: Open the VISU_IO_DIAG screen
steps.purpose: Access the read-only diagnostics screen where the informational banner is displayed.
steps.instruction: Open the VISU_IO_DIAG screen on the Operator Station HMI.
steps.expected_result: The VISU_IO_DIAG screen is displayed on the Operator Station HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The read-only VISU_IO_DIAG diagnostics screen is visible and available for troubleshooting.
steps.failure_condition: The VISU_IO_DIAG screen cannot be opened or is not available on the Operator Station HMI.

actions.label: Open VISU_IO_DIAG
actions.exact_action: Open the VISU_IO_DIAG screen on the Operator Station HMI.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall VISU_IO_DIAG screen layout and the informational banner area.
Display controls and screen access reference showing VISU_IO_DIAG availability.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the VISU_IO_DIAG screen cannot be accessed from the Operator Station HMI.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: NOTE: This screen is read-only and can be used for troubleshooting.
The listed control mapping includes F4 to "Visu_IO_Diag."

steps.title: Locate the informational banner
steps.purpose: Identify the banner area that displays alarms or informational messages.
steps.instruction: Locate the informational banner on the VISU_IO_DIAG screen that displays alarms or informational messages.
steps.expected_result: The informational banner is identified on the screen.
steps.healthy_condition: A banner area is visible and identified as the location where alarms or informational messages are displayed.
steps.failure_condition: The informational banner cannot be identified on the VISU_IO_DIAG screen.

actions.label: Find banner
actions.exact_action: Locate the informational banner that displays alarms or informational messages.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The informational banner area on the VISU_IO_DIAG screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the informational banner described in the source is not visible on the VISU_IO_DIAG screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Item 1: An informational banner displaying alarms or informational messages. The arrows on the right side of the banner can be used to navigate through messages in the banner.

steps.title: Observe the current banner message
steps.purpose: Capture the message currently shown before navigating to other messages.
steps.instruction: Observe the currently displayed banner message.
steps.expected_result: The current alarm or informational message shown in the banner is visible to the user.
steps.healthy_condition: A readable alarm or informational message is displayed in the banner.
steps.failure_condition: No message is visible, or the displayed message cannot be read from the banner.

actions.label: Read current message
actions.exact_action: Observe the currently displayed banner message.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The text currently shown in the informational banner.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the banner message area is present but no message can be read.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: An informational banner displaying alarms or informational messages.

steps.title: Navigate through banner messages
steps.purpose: Review additional messages available in the informational banner.
steps.instruction: Use the arrows on the right side of the banner to move through the available messages one at a time.
steps.expected_result: The banner advances through available messages one at a time using the right-side arrows.
steps.healthy_condition: Each arrow use changes the displayed banner message or confirms message navigation is available.
steps.failure_condition: Banner messages cannot be navigated using the arrows described in the source.

actions.label: Use banner arrows
actions.exact_action: Use the arrows on the right side of the banner to move through the available messages one at a time.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The arrows on the right side of the informational banner used for message navigation.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if banner messages cannot be navigated using the arrows described in the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Item 1: An informational banner displaying alarms or informational messages. The arrows on the right side of the banner can be used to navigate through messages in the banner.

steps.title: Record each displayed message
steps.purpose: Document the alarms or informational messages shown in the VISU_IO_DIAG banner for troubleshooting reference.
steps.instruction: Record each displayed alarm or informational message shown in the banner as you review the available messages.
steps.expected_result: Each displayed alarm or informational message has been documented.
steps.healthy_condition: A complete record of the messages visible through banner navigation is captured.
steps.failure_condition: Messages cannot be fully reviewed or documented because the banner cannot be read or navigated.

actions.label: Document messages
actions.exact_action: Record each displayed alarm or informational message shown in the banner.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The read-only diagnostics screen and banner messages being reviewed for documentation.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if messages cannot be fully reviewed because the banner cannot be navigated.
Do not infer message meaning beyond what is explicitly displayed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: NOTE: This screen is read-only and can be used for troubleshooting.
Item 1: An informational banner displaying alarms or informational messages. The arrows on the right side of the banner can be used to navigate through messages in the banner.

success_criteria: The VISU_IO_DIAG screen is opened successfully.
Available banner messages are reviewed using the right-side arrows.
Each displayed alarm or informational message is recorded.
healthy_conditions: The VISU_IO_DIAG screen is visible and read-only.
The informational banner displays alarms or informational messages.
The arrows on the right side of the banner allow message navigation.
Displayed messages can be read and documented.
failure_conditions: The VISU_IO_DIAG screen cannot be accessed.
The informational banner cannot be identified.
Banner messages cannot be navigated using the arrows described in the source.
Displayed messages cannot be read or fully documented.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if banner messages cannot be navigated using the arrows described in the source.
Escalate if the VISU_IO_DIAG screen or informational banner is not accessible as described.
Do not infer message meaning beyond what is explicitly displayed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Read-only VISU_IO_DIAG screen, informational banner, and banner navigation arrows.
Operator Station display controls showing access to VISU_IO_DIAG.

missing_details: The source does not provide a detailed method for how to record messages.
The source does not define the exact access sequence beyond identifying VISU_IO_DIAG as an Operator Station HMI screen and related display controls.
The source does not provide interpretation guidance for specific banner messages.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not state whether production stop or LOTO is required.
